title: selliguea hirsuta
intro: Selliguea hirsuta, also known as the Hairy Selliguea or False Daisy, is a type of plant belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, the leaves of this plant have been used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Selliguea hirsuta include the potential treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, the leaves are typically dried and made into teas or infusions, and they can also be used in the form of tinctures or capsules.
